entries.gt_02110cd3b5e736: If after a sortie an item became yours but smells like someone else's apartment, do not keep it by the bed.
entries.gt_0789edc4ef4fb7: Before a lower route, check the filter. Before an upper one, the paper. Before any route, the door you will hide behind.
entries.gt_154d9e0c4182f5: If the seam is dry after all-clear, mark it in chalk and do not touch it until rounds.
entries.gt_1eb85b521a07ac: Lost something after the lift - come quickly. In a day the find goes to house committee accounting.
entries.gt_221dfe889a7c46: If you came back without evidence, say that too. Sometimes no paper is more honest than someone else's stamp.
entries.gt_255745d478ee4f: From the lower pipes, bring a pressure log. Not a rumor, not a wet tale, a sheet with numbers.
entries.gt_2636895b9b2397: The map is yours. The red crosses on it are not treasure, but places where you should count ammo.
entries.gt_276700632e3248: Water, bandage, ammo, document. The rest is pride, and pride seals a hermodoor badly.
entries.gt_39ce0abb274923: Need a hermo-gasket. One good seam turns a room from a crack into shelter.
entries.gt_3eb80fd7c8cd3d: The next one going down will at least understand why you came back heavier than you left.
entries.gt_49e56cf2637f65: Through residential layers, take bread, a bandage, and six rounds. They bargain more often there, but shoot without warning.
entries.gt_57d8680d442a9d: I record only returns. Leaving there without return is no longer a route, but a missing person.
entries.gt_5e7acc5870552b: Lost property does not lie still. It walks circles until someone names the tag number.
entries.gt_5f7ec8f1b84d1d: After repair, listen to the hinges. A creak before the siren is sometimes more honest.
entries.gt_63a9f2a681653a: The common box gives the minimum: water, a bandage, bread, and four rounds. Buy, trade, or steal the rest consciously.
entries.gt_735227b837d482: Sortie checklist: water, food, bandage, ammo, filter or coupon, route paper. No objective - take a rumor or contract before the lift.
entries.gt_7a08d22849a058: The hermodoor is fixed before the siren. During the siren you only beg it, and usually lose.
entries.gt_7e4f54ac38fdd1: The next lift does not wait for the ready. It waits for those who at least checked their pockets.
entries.gt_876fbe8016c058: People read short: water dirty, do not stand by pipes, one bandage is not enough. That is enough.
entries.gt_8785755a2788d0: Down to the water: two bottles, filter, flashlight. If water sings in the pipe, do not drink and do not stand near it.
entries.gt_8e2f0e327b3b24: Vera Return: "Bring a pressure log from a lower sortie. I will pin it to the returns board: filter before lift, no canal water."
entries.gt_9325c64bb2771d: Pressure log on the board. The lower route is marked wet now; take a filter before the lift.
entries.gt_9b9fac0f190e12: Came back with evidence - give it to Vera. She writes briefly, but then people trust the route, not rumor.
entries.gt_b5c58ae8049348: I have the children's map. I will trade it for a tag, because children at least draw exits honestly.
entries.gt_b6818f3dc4dbf9: One seam holds. Not the whole block, but one corner can now wait out the draft.
entries.gt_c3072bd155532c: Misha Lost-and-Found: "Bring a key tag from someone else's cabinet. I will return the children's map and a water coupon, and the item will stop looking for its owner."
entries.gt_c8dfc32da719f0: Lida Route: "Bring two bottles of water before the lift. I will issue a filter, route, and six rounds: you do not go down with an empty throat."
entries.gt_cf025b38da8d33: If you find a key tag, do not try it on every door. Some doors are glad to take any name.
entries.gt_cfe832e80e277f: The prep point does not choose the route for you. It checks you are not going into the lift with an empty throat.
entries.gt_d1b22a8c15fd40: A door kit is not heroism. Install it, close it, survive - that is the whole instruction.
entries.gt_df598c593b55ca: The tag came back. The cabinet is listed to a living person again; that is progress.
entries.gt_e5bc21bdfd3beb: If a door slams by itself, do not hold it with your hand. Give it a hinge, a kit, and respect.
entries.gt_eeb0a8cc9f8268: A filter does not make a route safe. It just lets you breathe while you decide whether to run or steal.
entries.gt_f88e9d6b57fe1f: After proof, I will mark the board: filter before lift, no canal water, do not stand by the pipe.
entries.gt_fb737530ac7da3: Anya Herma: "Need a hermo-gasket for the nearest shelter. Bring it, and I will give a door kit and a tube of sealant."
entries.gt_fcf80046467f04: Up for papers: pass stub, clean hands, few extra notes. The Stamp-Eater likes fat pockets.
entries.gt_08d2cc9ed0ed28: I need a hermo-gasket. The house committee door is old, and the siren is young.
entries.gt_18f021baef93fe: If the siren starts, run to the house committee. I will run after you, if the floor lets go.
entries.gt_1b309f8195b82c: Zoya Laundry: "Bring two rolls of cloth. We will bind the wet gaps before the siren."
entries.gt_2659d4ad9eba80: Nina Section Elder: "Bring a denunciation, and we will decide who gets put out of shelter last."
entries.gt_2fffbe1ee13d97: If the drain hisses, leave. The Crawler first pretends it is a pipe.
entries.gt_3874545927f5cd: Cleanliness is temporary here. Same as tenants.
entries.gt_48ecb5460aa659: Two whole fuses - and I will give the lamps an honest flicker.
entries.gt_4e94387b4645fd: Zoya Laundry: "The Crawler is under the drain. Kill it or do not stand on the tile."
entries.gt_4e981c0bcc3672: The house committee is open until the siren. After the siren, it is closed even to the truth.
entries.gt_52c2c909a30a2a: The gasket set. The door curses more quietly now.
entries.gt_55937e53f20bcf: I do not trust the laundry. It airs out too easily.
entries.gt_567a04a9161e28: The house committee says to seal up with them. The laundry has no door, and the drain is louder than the siren.
entries.gt_5e9da15a146c9b: If the laundry howls, do not play hero. Get inside and close the door.
entries.gt_66d3060df1fb59: The block holds on lists, keys, and those who remember who needs tea without sugar.
entries.gt_6f90fb97a23e0f: The lamps blinked three times. By the manual it is a line check; by experience, time for the door.
entries.gt_7b4ad7838b6ce8: You can deliver the denunciation. You can refuse. The paper will find a desk anyway.
entries.gt_7bb981e2ad6672: I need cloth for the wet gaps. It will not save us, but it gives a minute.
entries.gt_7ff55e09f1df69: A neighbor's complaint is not paper. It is a small door into someone else's room.
entries.gt_8953add293e13d: Do not take someone else's laundry. Receipts are in the pockets, and receipts later find hands.
entries.gt_8d30a02db2b476: Listen to the fuse box, not the ceiling. It will say first where the line blew.
entries.gt_9aa93510d4d9fb: Bring two complaints. I will decide whom to save first and whom to check later.
entries.gt_9e525f82a72f69: A good door does not promise rescue. It just holds the gap while people have time to close up.
entries.gt_a3f7f99e50ee1a: Protocol accepted. Tea goes to those who do not make noise.
entries.gt_b1dba2e176b892: Nina Section Elder: "Two neighbor complaints. Without paper I cannot tell help from panic."
entries.gt_b30ad961eaed8f: Close behind you. Courtesy sometimes equals armor.
entries.gt_c24b0384060d92: If you want to hide here, respect the hinges first.
entries.gt_c50f92c4e49eb4: The laundry is dangerous because it is honest. No door means nothing to hide behind.
entries.gt_d36d6fcb3c6916: Arsen Gasket: "Find a hermo-gasket. Without it the house committee is just a pretty closet."
entries.gt_d742e45a7aa7b5: I listen not to the siren, but to the pause before it. Sometimes it names the zone number.
entries.gt_d7caab5e299aac: You cannot seal the laundry. It has the character of a corridor.
entries.gt_da8b5cfd7fa093: The laundry is blown through end to end. During the siren, people do not hide here; they disappear clean.
entries.gt_de0c1057b7b5a7: The signal is steadier. Bad news now arrives without coughing.
entries.gt_e0713e1017c310: I hear footsteps behind the closed door. That is normal. What is not normal is when the door does not hold the gap.
entries.gt_e113dacc8dfa23: Our door closes. That is why people think we are kind.
entries.gt_e973f68de51ba6: The gap is bound. Now at least you can see where the draft comes from.
entries.gt_f2365b353fdcda: Lev Siren: "Two fuses, and the siren will stop coughing before disaster."
entries.gt_f6564b1b53b80a: Fuses blow before the siren if the line got wet by the laundry.
entries.gt_fb5d69cf52f189: If the detector chirped near a dry floor, check the seam by the drain. Dry linoleum also carries water from below.
entries.gt_049ceaf4b55dd5: The receipt is dry. The NII now has wet ink in the logbook.
entries.gt_0559f60695782b: If the siren howls, do not drag Ira off to play hero. A living scientist is worth more than a full test tube.
entries.gt_0761998d74a82f: Pavel at the pass will give the key if he believes you are not dragging me into the corridor as bait.
entries.gt_1cf01ed9c3b46f: The passage is marked. You have the key, and the responsibility too.
entries.gt_260055bb2fc4dd: The white slime sample is in the locked sample room. I do not run fast, so you check the route first.
entries.gt_2a3bd9fd0987f9: Hear the grinding? The door is catching on the lower hinge; keep to the right wall.
entries.gt_2b4aee3059c591: Living Zone: NII laboratory table; the fake sample lies among empty containers.
entries.gt_2b8d9d642a3fa8: They accepted the forgery? Means they did not shake it.
entries.gt_2c88f4fb8005c0: The NII waits a long time for a real white sample; the market waits silently and at once.
entries.gt_408e20fe65c5fc: Ira Test-Tube: "Escort me to Pavel at the sample room. First his access and a cleared corridor, then the key and the tubes."
entries.gt_4321f066e416cd: Yegor Tagger: "Bring a fake sample with the right tag. I will close the act as if the risk was scientific."
entries.gt_502bc7983ec636: If I get cut down on the way, close the route. A sample without a witness quickly becomes ownerless evidence.
entries.gt_538741acf2e98e: Ira Test-Tube: "Now there is a key. Carry the white sample out of the locked room and bring it back to me sealed. You can turn in a dirty or fake one, but trust will not come back."
entries.gt_54faeba3f9f019: Living Zone: NII laboratory post; Pavel stands by the locked sample room.
entries.gt_5a86132276904d: Living Zone: locked NII sample room behind Pavel; the white sample lies in a cold box.
entries.gt_5cc8e238ca41e7: Pavel Pass: "A crooked white sample is not goods. Bring it to me; I will close access with a storage-violation report before the corridor starts arguing in voices."
entries.gt_6aff4606a85ab2: Cold box of the white seal
entries.gt_6b6214957390d8: Ira sent you? Fine. Take the key, but listen to the corridor first: the thing likes the smell of alcohol and wet labels.
entries.gt_6b66e06d090c59: Living Zone: locked NII sample room. A crookedly sealed sample can be hidden with Yegor instead of Pavel's report.
entries.gt_7554ba6654e257: If you find a sample with a broken seal, do not sell it as clean. Bring it to me and there will be a report; bring it to Yegor and there will be a fake act.
entries.gt_7e9a84b1202246: Yegor Tagger: "A crooked white sample can be hidden under audit. The NII sees paper, the market sees silence, and you see how fast trust runs out."
entries.gt_809fb85e4ce07b: Do not linger. Clean samples turn into dirty rumors fast.
entries.gt_83e94b3bd072b2: The tag matters more than the contents while nobody shakes the tube or asks it questions.
entries.gt_8f49a45d671264: There is a gap by the lower hinge in the sample room. Take the container quickly and do not stand under the lamp.
entries.gt_8fe66f28f1d037: Lera Quiet Sample: "Bring the white sample to me, not Ira, and you get money and a receipt. The NII will call it a loss later."
entries.gt_95805f36dfb61d: A damaged white sample can be hidden under audit. It does not save science, but it saves the route until the next inspection.
entries.gt_af911c167286c5: Access to the sample room is not issued for curiosity. The scientist goes only after the route is cleared.
entries.gt_b56ab147944a6b: Science loves a clean result. Accounting loves a result with a stamp.
entries.gt_d88711e16b34fc: Living Zone: locked NII sample room; only a clean white sample can be sold.
entries.gt_dc3cf05bde3864: I do not accept crooked containers as white. A broken seal sells not the sample, but your name.
entries.gt_df7c9196f5a510: Living Zone: locked NII sample room. Turn the crookedly sealed sample in to Pavel as a violation; do not keep it under a lamp.
entries.gt_e4819081b99a66: A fake sample is not a lie, but savings on substance.
entries.gt_e5631b22d193c6: A white sample with an intact seal comes to me. A crooked seal goes to Pavel as a report or to Yegor's cache, if you decided to spoil your night.
entries.gt_e84399a0348009: Trust at the NII is measured not in words, but by who came back with a sample, a seal, and a living witness.
entries.gt_eaebefc397fb76: A clean sample is for the NII. A dirty one is for the market. A fake one is for those who confuse bonus with science.
entries.gt_ef90bbae8bcbc9: If you bring the sealed sample to me, the scientist will call it betrayal. I call it risk pay.
entries.gt_fc2b434eb52bd1: I will not spot the fake right away. Unfortunately, that is also a scientific result.
entries.gt_fe41d81d7ae871: There is one key. Lose it, and the door gets smarter than both of us.
entries.gt_061c533ef1c18e: My certificate is clean until I cough on the stamp.
entries.gt_0af37827fefdcc: If anyone asks, you have been standing here a long time and did not touch your face.
entries.gt_30f83d9d8f096d: If they give one bandage, I will take half. Leave the other half for whoever goes to the hermodoor.
entries.gt_338bda531448d3: After purple fog, I ask not bravery, but sleep and filter.
entries.gt_36210afbf1ef71: Doctor Kruglov: "Bring three bandages to the emergency medpost. In return I will issue pills and a certificate without queue."
entries.gt_36c61c8253b9d8: Someone else's cabinet opens easily. Then the logbook opens.
entries.gt_38132b2174f2d9: The antidepressant is not for courage. It is for sleep, when the eyes will not close after the fog.
entries.gt_4a75fd9dbcceed: A bandage warm after an hour goes to the table. Cold and wet goes in a separate bag; do not approach the door.
entries.gt_4f32917ff732f6: Restock the box with bandages, and I will release part of the reserve without scandal.
entries.gt_5a5f3d0f6bc112: The orderly counts ampoules louder than footsteps in the corridor.
entries.gt_5fdfb7e8d727c1: Iodine will run out before the shift. So we pour exact, not pretty.
entries.gt_6257175739d6e6: Kruglov received the bandages; the medpost held the queue without opening the cabinet.
entries.gt_65d001d0df9e8d: Thank you for the bandages. Now at least one person will live to reach the queue.
entries.gt_6741b0b3f4bb8f: The medpost lives while the reserve has not become rumor.
entries.gt_6ed83df1dd7aff: This is an emergency medpost, not a hospital. We treat with what has not been stolen yet.
entries.gt_70b00f66b98f64: I am in the queue after blood and before fever. A good place, if you do not fall.
entries.gt_72c9f967ab40ab: The orderly is angry not because he is angry. Because this is his third shift counting the living.
entries.gt_8122c067557fd4: Check the dressing at the turn, not in the middle of the corridor.
entries.gt_85212cab8ddbdb: If you need medicine, buy now. After the siren the price will crawl again.
entries.gt_8a588148e47a53: Living Zone: Kruglov's emergency medpost and his sealed cabinet.
entries.gt_8b3c4a5eb814b4: Pressure first, then talk. If you are standing, that is already good.
entries.gt_9cf4e5481bcf40: I am not a doctor. I make sure the cabinets do not leave before the wounded.
entries.gt_a233e472f7023f: Do not stand in the passage. My stretchers move faster than your thoughts.
entries.gt_a3b5a251af6cf1: Filter wet? Take it off slowly. Do not touch your face with your hands.
entries.gt_a6754d00e9bcb0: Emergency medpost restocked with bandages until the next queue.
entries.gt_aec4ee68fa0dc9: The feldsher said not to sleep after OVS. I would like to, but sleep left by itself.
entries.gt_af5bf633b773a0: Kruglov trades honestly until the queue starts pressing the door.
entries.gt_afa4def1323fde: If you steal from the bag, do not argue with the event. It has already happened.
entries.gt_bd8eab786c2b2b: The queue moved by one breath. At the medpost that is almost a holiday.
entries.gt_c0981f848158ae: Close the door. Iodine pulls into the corridor, and the queue immediately climbs inside.
entries.gt_c0b51b7fd4aaf1: Morphine only by signature. Pain is loud, but the logbook is louder.
entries.gt_d99b774b4aa840: State the temperature as a number. The scary word does not fit in the chart.
entries.gt_e2a2cde954ec3c: Whoever touches their face after the filter argues with Kruglov later.
entries.gt_e7f58ad706771b: Bandages go to blood, antibiotic by list, pills for money or a service.
entries.gt_ff6e63af6a6baa: If the purple fog returns, straight to the hermodoor. You can argue after the filter.
entries.gt_15e160467c23b1: Kruglov treats by ledger. I take pain off now, without window or signature.
entries.gt_165ae1651a3022: Klim Gatherer: "Bring an infected mushroom. Levin will put it in salve, and I will give your share without extra surnames."
entries.gt_17e029bf51ce35: If inspection comes late, let it still come.
entries.gt_1946436219f237: I trust paper less now, but I breathe more evenly.
entries.gt_1d91fc0bc04f2d: Levin pays for raw stock. Patients pay for the word "course".
entries.gt_2ce48fc72c0ba1: Whoever wants a clean diagnosis should first live to see a clean corridor.
entries.gt_3b1ca82615a762: I do not heal. I know where zhelemish grows without questions.
entries.gt_3d17e598a8ab90: Zhelemish is not medicine. It is a reason to wait for real medicine.
entries.gt_4c395d32859e48: If inspection comes, you bought the salve for yourself. Easier for everyone to write it up.
entries.gt_4d0ea98513600e: The fake medcorner share was taken; a new zhelemish batch went into treatment.
entries.gt_52a0f059d429bd: Do not call it a mushroom in front of the patient. The patient hears the price, not the ingredients.
entries.gt_5548291a442f57: If you carry the complaint upstairs, do not give it to the first nameless window.
entries.gt_56836f9e1ed18a: A real antibiotic costs a week of water. I do not have a week.
entries.gt_6b6220479fb708: Complaint filed or not, Dasha is not smearing that gray filth anymore.
entries.gt_6e4df4719c3f9b: Warn her. From me she only hears fear now.
entries.gt_7bfce4d54ce69b: Dasha Under-Gauze: "If the certificate is fake, take the complaint to Vera Pass. Let the window at least ask what is in it."
entries.gt_7c3637f0cf3f61: The salve chills under the bandage. Levin says that is how the fever comes out.
entries.gt_7f9bf42ac42b3d: Levin Salve: "Thirty-five rubles for a course of zhelemish salve. Not treatment, but you will not last in the queue until morning."
entries.gt_8d91018183b508: Dasha trusts the coat. Levin's coat is cleaner than the logbook.
entries.gt_9323eabbd81973: The complaint about the zhelemish medcorner went to the pass bureau; the fake treatment was exposed.
entries.gt_95eca759230b16: If this is a fraud, do not tell me first. I almost believed it already.
entries.gt_9723d4d15d8526: Lina Under-Gauze: "Tell Dasha the salve is zhelemish. From me she only hears panic."
entries.gt_a1e5cd1b266c32: She heard you. From me Dasha expected panic; from you she got the salve formula.
entries.gt_aa9082c0b88af5: The certificate says "topical remedy". The spot still hurts.
entries.gt_ad3f073921a901: I saw him scrape zhelemish off a jar and call it a course.
entries.gt_b8c1cb0499133f: Dried zhelemish, ground up, steeped in boiling water. Cheap until the queue asks for a certificate.
entries.gt_bd24dcac3bc539: They took me off zhelemish. The smell stayed, the fever got lower.
entries.gt_cd0943c9555ee5: Bring an infected cap and you get a share. Do not bring a surname.
entries.gt_ce285254096591: After buying the zhelemish course, the patient got worse; the medcorner blamed the queue.
entries.gt_d46e0d0adf830f: The block pays for a fast solution. Then the block pays again.
entries.gt_e2ca62fc7e529a: Your share is yours. Let the coat explain the rest.
entries.gt_f0e22f72e004c6: The cheaper the treatment, the more expensive the silence beside the cot.
entries.gt_f707cfe10c2b0e: The patient was warned about zhelemish salve; she refused the fake course.
entries.gt_1168bfc51d7155: You can negotiate. You can lead people out. I propose the shortest report.
entries.gt_1251fb679d3e4e: Tamara Raid: "Kill Stepan Raid. Without their leader, his people will run through the corridor, not the apartments."
entries.gt_143c6af3dad306: I do not want anyone shooting. I want to know the door on that side did not become a wall.
entries.gt_16f744fa08e7fc: There is an exit. Means we can breathe quieter.
entries.gt_2a499cee033d5d: There is a short corridor behind the wardrobe. If it is open, you can leave while the adults argue.
entries.gt_49eb325ee0f448: Mira Under the Table: "Steal the complaint with the apartment list from the raiders' bag. Without the list they will not know where to go next."
entries.gt_4ece66269ccff6: You can shoot. You can pay. You can just find an exit. Just do not stand in the doorway.
entries.gt_5bbae95e1301ff: The leader is down, the list leads nobody now. Raid closed dirty, but closed.
entries.gt_6b23ee7c91a0e7: Do not play hero. Twenty-two rubles and I pretend the apartment is already empty.
entries.gt_726e969e4ca9a6: Stepan Raid: "Twenty-two rubles for quiet. Pay, and we leave later and not through this door."
entries.gt_72cd46f38d7410: Tell your people bargaining is cheaper than burying furniture.
entries.gt_7832a74dce148e: Apartment list carried out of the raiders' bag
entries.gt_856b540bea9616: Raiders took payoff and delayed the raid
entries.gt_9766f1c024b8d2: The leader's bag has an apartment list. Carry out the list, and they will not know whom to take next.
entries.gt_983b3ba3420c70: Do not touch the bag. The bag has addresses, and addresses feed better than bread.
entries.gt_9d9e1913d8e648: The man with the pipe holds the list. Remove him, and the raid falls apart into running.
entries.gt_a2b5080632d7bd: Apartment list carried out of the raiders' bag.
entries.gt_a3518fbf7fc53f: Theft from the raiders' bag noticed
entries.gt_a8981d40066628: Do not confuse order with quiet. There are just fewer commands here now.
entries.gt_ab28ad3c875617: Do not call it rescue. Today the door just closed earlier.
entries.gt_ae3e0fcc1fe43c: You can fight. Only then nobody will argue who started.
entries.gt_b78bef0c76681a: The list is no longer theirs. Now at least the next address is silent.
entries.gt_bc1e18543aeb10: Backup corridor exit checked without a fight
entries.gt_c8c3395ee58a31: Took the money. Today we do not need this door.
entries.gt_d264a620ac5a2d: They came in like neighbors, only they asked right away where the water was and who else was home.
entries.gt_d57797aa7dbe5d: Raiders' bag came up short on things
entries.gt_e818f00e1780a0: Vika By the Exit: "Check the backup corridor exit {dir}. If the path is alive, we can leave without a fight."
entries.gt_e9d48bca45dac4: I remembered: sometimes victory is not staying in the room.
entries.gt_f153de6b7272cc: If you go into the bag, do it before the shots. After shots, all papers become evidence.
entries.gt_097c1e962129b7: Do not take white residue with bare fingers. It sticks to the glove, and to skin even more.
entries.gt_0b137962a877c0: The hand is cold and not mine. Mine would have left long ago.
entries.gt_0d1c29170bdb95: If the person is not led out, the sample will be dirty. Science sometimes knows shame.
entries.gt_212364342b2cdb: White room: seam closed with sealant.
entries.gt_3408f29eb29856: White room: scraping handed to the scientists.
entries.gt_346f8543dbe11d: Yes. Hold the hand tighter. If you let go at the threshold, I will come back without legs.
entries.gt_426d112d91a368: Klim Seal: "One tube of sealant, and I will close the white room along the seam. Without sealant it is just a leaf on its word of honor."
entries.gt_48a5e096a2a288: The seam accepted the sealant. Now nobody approaches the residue without a key and witness.
entries.gt_4ff9804af5463d: Do not hit her. Just stand between her and the stain, say her name, lead her to the door.
entries.gt_513846250a35da: There is a blank receipt on the table. Sign it, and the room is written off with the person.
entries.gt_5258518466ea23: If you close the room, people out first. Paper after.
entries.gt_66a3500c349824: I will take the sample to Yakov Davidovich. The report will list weight, color, contact time, and who stood too close.
entries.gt_735b3783181445: The sample is sealed. While the seal is dry, it can be carried to Yakov Davidovich in the NII laboratory.
entries.gt_787ce4507f717d: If someone knocks from inside after the seal, check the name first.
entries.gt_791a70d6c3f2f2: Sealant on the hinge, gasket in the groove. Not heroism, just a closed leaf.
entries.gt_7db5abb2849170: There is glass in the tray. Scrape, lid, step back. No explanations by the wall.
entries.gt_94bbf1d86a6be4: I will step away now. Now. Just counting tiles to the wall.
entries.gt_964caec41c6e8d: Act accepted. Tonya is now a line in the logbook and a closed door.
entries.gt_9ab07de18d607b: If you look at the floor, stepping back is easier.
entries.gt_9da3389167b300: Tonya stands by the white trace and does not hear her name.
entries.gt_a1e844eb839033: Yefim Act: "Bring the receipt from the table. If there is a signature, the room counts as abandoned. Sometimes that is also a choice."
entries.gt_a95076ec641c6f: If I go to the wall again, say my name, but not loudly.
entries.gt_a952192c7e57c3: White room: Tonya was led away from the residue.
entries.gt_a9768836126fbc: You can do nothing. The house committee turns decisions like that into acts quickly.
entries.gt_b3df1f7740a495: Tonya sits at the threshold. Her gaze still sticks to the wall, but her legs listen.
entries.gt_b59e02b30cbc8c: The door must close before anyone else approaches the wall.
entries.gt_b771c6a7be4b92: Thank you. When a person goes silent by a wall like that, it is worse than screaming.
entries.gt_b821451f184706: White stains like paper. On paper it is easier not to see a person.
entries.gt_ba436d2a6b9fc6: I do not advise. I record, so everyone talks quieter later.
entries.gt_bc276892717fb9: Let scientists take samples. I count people who came out.
entries.gt_c09f65ac8acf6f: White room: tenant written off with the premises.
entries.gt_c2882f8af0fd63: Dasha By the Threshold: "Go to Tonya and lead her away from the white residue. Use her name, look at her, not the wall."
entries.gt_d29706229a2775: They led me away from the stain. Now I see the door, not only the wall.
entries.gt_e1a34ed2d740b8: Quiet. There is white coating on the wall; eyes do not unstick from it.
entries.gt_fbf2e20c39b8f9: Mark Sampler: "Take the white scraping from the tray and bring it straight to me. Do not put it with food, papers, or your excuses."
entries.gt_00504f67aa5868: Point one: do not panic. Point two: if panic is already here, record it in the logbook.
entries.gt_071fb6604374bc: Do not touch the door kit without an adult. Today the adult is you.
entries.gt_0fcb61794b1d33: If someone knocks from the opening in a child's voice, I answer. With a pipe.
entries.gt_1dc0eca5870f8e: If the siren has started, do not argue at the threshold. Close it.
entries.gt_3a00e4465a091f: My chalk was white, and the arrow came out pointing to shelter. I did not mean to.
entries.gt_3bdb0da346dd4b: I do not need pretty words. Tell me where the shelter is, and who goes last.
entries.gt_3c1978e85bb659: I count heads. If a head argues, I count again.
entries.gt_3d9b32f5c55be6: There is one ration. Teacher says divide by list. I say little ones first, then argue.
entries.gt_4387606c84705b: Nina OBZH: "Bring a wrench to the torn hermodoor. I will issue the kit to you: install the door here or carry it off - your decision."
entries.gt_4d3315d73eb9a0: Away from the door. Hands on the desk, chalk in the box, eyes off the peephole.
entries.gt_500843b0181902: Nina OBZH: "Check with Vadim Monitor. He knows the list better than adults."
entries.gt_5540bff965b135: If the door is closed, I will wait. If it is open, I promise nothing.
entries.gt_5c006941e2d43c: Teacher said keep hands busy. I am holding bread and not crying loudly.
entries.gt_654c0fe52433e1: Roman Duty: "Draw the thing away from the torn door. Do not fight at the opening: pull the noise onto yourself, then hit."
entries.gt_739ae48fd4e3b7: We count heads out loud. Whoever loses count starts again, no shame.
entries.gt_82ee417cfab375: First the medkit. Then shelter. Then the list. Then the door. Short lesson, because the siren is long.
entries.gt_847d6fd18f4b8b: No heroics at a torn hermodoor. Repair it or lead people somewhere else.
entries.gt_84fd65f081e6dc: I will take my child before the order. The order will not apologize later.
entries.gt_a37df2112936cc: Nina OBZH: "Check ${SHELTER_NAME}. The route must be in your legs before the siren, not in talk."
entries.gt_a7863c414801e7: Without a list, nobody enters the shelter. Even if the corridor is already knocking.
entries.gt_ae2470cf52dcbe: A voice can be distracted with noise. Children can be protected only with distance and a door.
entries.gt_b088440bbc1dcc: Do not let children near the peephole. Even if it promises parents and light.
entries.gt_b1fee6f406b495: I know the rule: do not run. But legs sometimes read the wrong poster.
entries.gt_b2d74782e9d456: Nina counts heads better than me. I count mine, then feel ashamed and count the others.
entries.gt_bdf769e364664e: I have the list. Tell Nina OBZH: three go to the shelter, one stays by the door, the parents' committee argues but goes.
entries.gt_cfd9bfdf1caf58: I marked you in the logbook as a conditionally useful adult.
entries.gt_d066e84cb2eea7: The children's map is in the logbook. It is wrong, but better than adult signs.
entries.gt_d74f623dc12e3a: The hermodoor is torn off. Install the kit, and the fog hits iron.
entries.gt_dcd1dd1968ad42: If something from the opening calls you mama, we do not answer. First one hundred, then the logbook, then an adult.
entries.gt_dd9a8fa2e16ebc: I hold the corridor while it holds as a corridor.
entries.gt_e2ba5ce8cb93e3: During samosbor, children listen to rules. Adults more often bargain with rules.
entries.gt_ea536b7cf7f53b: If they install the door, I will sit under the desk and count breaths to one hundred.
entries.gt_ecaaa63691c08c: Nina OBZH: "Need two bandages for the classroom first-aid kit. Without the kit, evacuation turns into running around."
entries.gt_ed9ad5c8626c2f: The evacuation log does not calm anyone. It just keeps us from forgetting who else to look for.
entries.gt_f85b3131964b27: Lida from the parents' committee: "Lead us to ${SHELTER_NAME}. I am not arguing; I go last and count heads."
entries.gt_fa903ebcbe6231: I remembered where the shelter is. If only the chalk arrow is not wiped off before the siren.
entries.gt_1359195128cbfe: Step away from the door. If you need help, call Yury. If you need proof, leave a note, not a hand.
entries.gt_1a461dced16b2f: If you still open it, move back to the common corner. The inhuman likes when a human shortens the distance himself.
entries.gt_1b6776ce1115c8: Do not open for a familiar voice. Familiar people knock with hands; this knocks meat into the hinge.
entries.gt_1bf217d5b03458: Zoya Neighbor: "Tell Yury Seal that the voice behind the door calls in my brother's voice. Let this stay Liquidator work, not our mistake."
entries.gt_22fe56b71089f2: Voice Behind the Door: threshold marked.
entries.gt_476d116c4416c2: The door jerks on the third knock. The first two are for trust.
entries.gt_4bb6bba37422db: Lenya Marker: "Give duct tape. We will mark the door so the next person does not open for a native voice and raw smell."
entries.gt_4cd5b03c27633e: The voice behind the door knows the name, but confuses the kitchen, patronymic, and year of samosbor. The living do not make mistakes like that.
entries.gt_5491323c32eeca: It is quieter behind this leaf now. Not perfect, but quieter.
entries.gt_58e6e90a7be888: The Liquidator saw the mark. Means I was not the only one hearing someone else's voice.
entries.gt_699370a3d10edb: The jar is closed and labeled. Now it is not a voice in the corridor, but evidence on a shelf.
entries.gt_783c380dbb48d4: The mark holds. Now at least you can see which door does not deserve pity.
entries.gt_7b4cbc2543ccb1: If the mark is torn off, hang the tape again. Without a mark, someone will believe the voice and put a hand to the handle.
entries.gt_874aa53c5ebeb4: Sometimes a piece of truth stays in the jar with the voice. Better take it after the shot, not before.
entries.gt_8ee7b755bb0fe3: Voice Behind the Door: inhuman exposed.
entries.gt_91821d3d8acc1b: If you decide to clear it, do not stand in the opening. Open, back up, corner, light, then shoot.
entries.gt_9f7607e6683684: Yury Seal: "One tube of sealant, and I will clamp the hinge down. No need to open if we can fix the handle and hand the door to rounds."
entries.gt_a9dade13c2bb7c: It calls in my brother's voice. My brother has been gone since the last wet samosbor, and the voice asks to be opened like after a shift.
entries.gt_aa837e1ed18764: Door hinge with someone else's voice sealed with sealant.
entries.gt_aef2d0f8e20639: Now when there is knocking, I look at the jamb first.
entries.gt_bbc5cff71991ca: Klava Listener: "If you open it, do it on purpose. Kill the inhuman behind the door and take the jar before it speaks in your voice."
entries.gt_be752532c40fbb: A seal does not heal the door. It fixes the hinge so nobody yanks the handle out of stupidity.
entries.gt_c2d75276454824: Jar under the floorboard behind the voice
entries.gt_c46c4faac312ab: Voice Behind the Door: left to the Liquidators.
entries.gt_c6cb51fed7bb5c: Sealant on the hinge, tape on the jamb, act on the table. Then the Liquidators can argue with what remains inside.
entries.gt_ceee5982a0c608: I listened through a mirror. Behind the door someone smiles before hearing the question.
entries.gt_d44ba7251e6db8: Voice Behind the Door: hinge sealed.
entries.gt_dcbacddf1ffc11: The smell of raw meat comes from below. In a normal apartment it smells like that only after a bad pot, and there is no pot there.
entries.gt_e3927e43f283d1: After clearing, do not touch the door until rounds. The hinge is wet; the handle may bite.
entries.gt_e768157aff20bb: Door with someone else's voice left to the Liquidators.
entries.gt_f5125ab120e846: Door with someone else's voice marked before opening.
entries.gt_f9fe455fa44cf0: Voice Behind the Door released and cleared.
entries.gt_ff5f9dc4beefdb: I marked the jamb with tape. If you really need to listen, listen from one step back.
entries.gt_07d25271adb063: The tenants will hiss. But the Liquidators will come to count, not shoot at once.
entries.gt_0d631cfe1690ad: Do not ask whether this is charity or denunciation. We have one form for both.
entries.gt_12a942938c56a6: A free candle is theft; a candle for sealing wax is already accounting.
entries.gt_20795761c39f1e: Agafya Candle: "Bring two bottles of water to the common candle reserve. We will hand them out by the door to those the siren caught without a flask."
entries.gt_25e7243b83eecd: A church reserve without a ledger is a future fight with an empty line by the door.
entries.gt_28e3d68f63080e: When someone else's noise comes through the pipe, guard duty means whoever closes the door first.
entries.gt_2b8524a3c89302: Lida Wax: "One sealing wax, one istotit candle, and a mug of tea. No rite, just exchange."
entries.gt_3cbeac70819774: Bring sealing wax and I will sign the candle stub as a contribution. Funny until the queue sees the empty box.
entries.gt_409904114bc802: Common candle reserve handed over to rounds
entries.gt_50831bdda9dd28: It got quieter by the door. Now you can hear neighbors counting bottles.
entries.gt_5331f3912c05fe: Barter is more honest than pretty words when there is a queue by the door.
entries.gt_6a788e51eb18cf: Bring a shelter list and I will file it as a report of concealed supplies. Ugly, but by form.
entries.gt_6ebfbaacab9592: Savva Door: "An Assembled is rubbing at the reserve door. Kill one before the candles become bait."
entries.gt_81a1351fbb4f77: Common candle reserve water distributed to neighbors
entries.gt_9b5ed8e5790481: Ledger accepted. Now the box is common by protocol, not conscience.
entries.gt_9f139e38f7d574: If someone reaches into the box after you, he reaches in before witnesses.
entries.gt_ac4f4613ec6881: The water was carried out. Now at least one argument starts after all-clear, not before it.
entries.gt_b03bb7453bea9f: Keep the candle low. Raise it high, and the queue sees the reserve and starts counting someone else's.
entries.gt_b7a7028cb3cbed: I do not trade promises. I swap consumable for consumable before the queue climbs into the box.
entries.gt_c17a4c6cb8318b: This is not a shop. It is a common box for when the siren suddenly starts singing.
entries.gt_c6a174da3444e7: Bring two bottles of water, and we will distribute them to those shaking by the door. I will leave you one candle by ledger.
entries.gt_c795e4f2b9b530: Rounds folder for the candle reserve
entries.gt_c990a986ccf5ef: Markel Rounds: "Carry the shelter list. If supplies are hidden behind candles, there will be an act on concealed provisions."
entries.gt_cd1aafda2f79b4: The Assembled behind the wall has already smelled wax. Drive it off, and people will believe the reserve is still common.
entries.gt_e4c1e5798d6d47: We count candles by stubs, water by someone else's thirst. Take quietly, and you steal from the queue.
entries.gt_e81026c91dada3: The sealing wax went to the seal. Keep the candle, but do not promise to save anyone with it.
entries.gt_ef8d7113a24348: Istotit is Covered by Christ, but the box by people. People become church faster than honest.
entries.gt_fd88f6893e8c04: I stand by the door not against faith. I stand so the church box is not carried off with the door.
entries.gt_05fcd788aadc2f: If I pay today, tomorrow they will look for me by name, not by debt.
entries.gt_312f65eecc706d: An unsigned denunciation is cheaper than bread. A signed one is bought silently.
entries.gt_34c89b03c73b3b: The paper said enough. People will be silent louder now.
entries.gt_35785cee89bc0f: If medicine got more expensive, someone did not reach the medpost in time.
entries.gt_36f3821883ca10: Eighty-eight rubles is not a sum. It is a door between me and the guards.
entries.gt_37dfabad6c9ea6: Breathing is quieter. The debt is gone, but the place for it stayed.
entries.gt_3921333e84ad85: The crates are not locked. They just belong to people with keys, pistols, and a free evening.
entries.gt_3cede4a64c8451: There is a snitch in the market. Do not look for a person - look for paper.
entries.gt_416e73900d620c: See the safes? Not goods in there. Reasons people come back.
entries.gt_49d178e9b46a58: Nina Whisper: "Find the denunciation in the safe. The snitch does not need killing; he needs reading aloud."
entries.gt_4fe180db7d9358: Ilya Debt: "Close eighty-eight rubles for me. Otherwise Ryzhy writes me off as expense."
entries.gt_513a728cf6b7ae: Marta Eighth: "Need an antibiotic. Buy it out, steal it, beg it out - shortage will set the price itself."
entries.gt_5b751055c4e801: Lena Basement: "There is a Liquidator token in the debt box. Bring it, and you get an energy cell. If they hear you, run."
entries.gt_5ea85406c3ab48: I am not guarding the market here. I am guarding the debtor list from shortening.
entries.gt_61b9071d9344e5: Theft sounds louder than a shot here. A shot is honest at least.
entries.gt_6db0acb9c1dc58: Do not take from the box without asking. The guards like simple events.
entries.gt_713743dbe1abbc: Today you pay up front. That is almost trust.
entries.gt_83ec1aa92c9ac2: There is medicine. The price moves with shortage, not with me.
entries.gt_94ff2bc5df3bf5: I took the pills before samosbor. After samosbor the price was different.
entries.gt_963a33fdfac29a: The next hatch will be wet. Take a filter, if you have something to pay with.
entries.gt_9b17bf28bd562c: A fake pass smells of ink only for the first five minutes.
entries.gt_9ba539a4195aa7: A Liquidator token is expensive because living people rarely give one up.
entries.gt_9cabef24d1896a: If anyone asks, we talked about corridor weather.
entries.gt_a138ddd09ad5e9: Marta Eighth: "Bring a fake pass. I will pass it to someone who must not exit officially."
entries.gt_a5008e4da319d5: Hands out of the box - you live on.
entries.gt_b3e5caadd56aa9: If Marta said you can, then for now you can.
entries.gt_b73aebb9d17b2c: Marta smiled. I do not know if that is good.
entries.gt_bc9e63639a300a: Look at the counter, not the safe.
entries.gt_bfd79b68e90102: Quiet. Here they count not rubles, but those who lived to settle up.
entries.gt_cd305a5952a169: Need a pass - bring a clean blank or someone else's signature.
entries.gt_d6b617f4969285: The token is real. Means someone now has no number.
entries.gt_fc58b9590965d9: The shipment came through the hatch. The hatch went back without a guide.
